title: Tambacounda Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tambacounda, with a Z-Score of +4.29. This event has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tambacounda is extreme, with a Z-Score of +4.29, indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures. 
 The temperature is causing high CDD values of 14.0 GG, while the humidity is relatively low at 29%. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 11.4 km/h, but is not providing sufficient relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
